title: Backported mobs
description: Add new mob textures variants from 1.21.5 to older versions
body:
# Backported Mobs
A simple resource pack that adds updated mobs and warm and cold mob varieties like 1.21.5 to older versions

Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) installed to work.



![Backported mobs render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac9df92284c5685c1ec186e0e4a5ac975ebe3649.png)
# Dependency download links
Optifine: [https://optifine.net/home](https://optifine.net/home)

Entity Model Features: [https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

Entity Texture Features: [https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
